name: Wandering Mummy
desc: You can flip this card into face-down Defense Position once per turn during your Main Phase. After you use this effect, rearrange the face-down Defense Position monsters in your Main Monster Zones, then return them in face-down Defense Position.
mnst_eff: You can flip this card into face-down Defense Position once per turn during your Main Phase. After you use this effect, rearrange the face-down Defense Position monsters in your Main Monster Zones, then return them in face-down Defense Position.
eff: You can flip this card into face-down Defense Position once per turn during your Main Phase. After you use this effect, rearrange the face-down Defense Position monsters in your Main Monster Zones, then return them in face-down Defense Position.
